capOne_le_cap : ∀ (cap x : Nat), capOne cap x ≤ cap
capOne_le_self : ∀ (cap x : Nat), capOne cap x ≤ x
capList_invariant : ∀ (cap : Nat) (xs : List Nat),
  (capList cap xs).length = xs.length ∧ allLe cap (capList cap xs) ∧ sumList (capList cap xs) ≤ sumList xs
